Represents a looping frame‑based animation.

Controls all animation state transitions for the pet.

animStates - Class in AnimationStates
Manages all animation states for the pet and provides a simple interface for switching, updating, and retrieving animation frames.

Creates a new animation state manager and loads all animation sequences.

Public enum of all available animation states.

init() - Static method in class project.Trivia.dao.DatabaseInitialiser
Initializes the database by creating all required tables and seeding questions from QuestionsSeeder.
initialize() - Method in class project.desktoppet302.PetController
 
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class project.pomodoro.controller.PomodoroController
Initializes the editable TableView FXML TableView is populated by user's recorded Session data stored in the SQLite database Allows Users to directly update Session Data by selecting and editing cells Read and Update CRUD operations are handled here.
insert(Session) - Method in class project.pomodoro.model.SessionDAO
CRUD Operation - Create Operation Insert a new Session to the database, assigning the new Session fields
